events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: torquing rubber bushings at full droop instead of ride height locks in a static torsional preload in the rubber that OEM/alignment specs prohibit — it's a preload error (TRD) that will cause premature bushing cracking, suspension bind, and alignment drift once the vehicle settles to curb height. Judged **fail**, `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, medium risk, with rework actions (loosen, reposition at ride height, re-torque, re-check alignment) before close-out.
